summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Cold Calling SaaS platform - Auth system, Pricing, TTS integration. Fixed React hooks violation in LoginPage.jsx. All 15 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working.

bugs_fixed.issue: React hooks (useState) called conditionally after early return - violates Rules of Hooks
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved useState declarations before the conditional return statement

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest execution with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully tested and working. React hooks bug fixed. All 4 pricing tiers display correctly ($199, $399, $699, $349). ElevenLabs TTS integration working. Twilio voice calls are MOCKED.

frontend_ui.landing_page: Displays 4 pricing plans with correct prices - PASS
frontend_ui.login_page: Email/password form and Google OAuth button - PASS
frontend_ui.registration: Sign up form with validation - PASS
frontend_ui.protected_routes: Redirect to /login when not authenticated - PASS
frontend_ui.dashboard: Sales funnel with leads, user info, credits display - PASS

mocked_apis.twilio_voice_calls: MOCKED - Real calls require Twilio credentials
